label: 白底产品主视觉
texture_guidance: 哑光白底、浅灰阴影、干净陶瓷或金属餐具、真实食物质感。
scene_prompt: CLEAN HERO PRODUCT POSTER. light: large softbox light from upper left, weak fill from front, shadow falls softly to lower right, no dramatic colored light. material: matte warm-white background, ceramic plate, brushed metal spoon, natural food texture, subtle paper grain, no plastic shine. color: warm white #F8F6F0, soft grey #D8D4CC, one appetite accent from food color, Meituan yellow used only as a small brand accent. composition: one product or symbolic dish is centered or slightly lower-center, occupying 45-60% of canvas; headline sits in the top 22-28% horizontally centered or right-of-center, keeping the TOP-LEFT corner (upper 15% height × left 30% width) free of text for brand logo overlay — subtle whitespace or soft shadow there is fine; secondary info sits below the hero, no more than three text blocks. avoid: no busy restaurant background, no fake luxury, no red-gold festival props, no collage, no neon, no generic thick gold 3D type, no headline text in top-left logo zone.
design_lessons: 新品视觉优先让产品成为唯一记忆点，白底和留白负责提升识别效率。
